response.justification: Strong individual-contributor background spanning 13+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, with genuine interest in testing, TDD, and developer tooling (Selenium course, Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, GitLab/CI setup). However, the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no evidence of leading teams of engineers with direct reports, and no demonstrated work on large-scale developer productivity infrastructure (build systems, compilers, test automation at platform scale). Mobile-platform exposure is limited to a brief Apple TV/iOS stint in 2015-2016. The role explicitly requires 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership at scale, which this candidate does not clearly meet.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot software engineering with strong testing and TDD discipline
Hands-on developer-tooling work: test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, MCP code generators
Demonstrated ability to teach and mentor through workshops, courses, and meetups
concerns: No documented people-management or direct-report leadership experience
Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is thin and dated (one role ~2015-2016)
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap at scale
